AEF.notes: French Equatorial Africa represented as a macro-level colonial federation.

ALG.notes: French Algeria represented as a separate colonial administration.

ANG.notes: Portuguese Angola represented as a separate colonial administration.

AOF.notes: French West Africa represented as a macro-level colonial federation.

AOI.notes: Italian East Africa replaces the separate Eritrean and Somali colonial administrations in the 1939 setup.

BEA.notes: British East Africa macro government covering Kenya, Uganda, and Tanganyika.

BRM.notes: Burma separation from British Raj at runtime-country level.

BWA.notes: British West Africa macro government covering Nigeria, the Gold Coast, Sierra Leone, and the Gambia.

CEY.notes: Ceylon represented as a distinct British colony.

CHI.notes: Hainan and Guangdong baseline moved back under Nationalist Chinese ownership.

EGY.notes: Egypt represented as a British-associated kingdom rather than direct metropolitan rule.

ENG.notes: British imperial approximation for protectorates, mandates, and colonies outside the dedicated subject governments.

FIN.notes: Aland Islands should follow Finland in 1936.

FRA.notes: French colonial approximation for remaining African and overseas possessions outside the dedicated subject governments.

GER.notes: German 1936 eastern frontier including East Prussia and western territories now inside Poland.

GMA.notes: Scenario extension: Gansu Ma clique split from the coarse XSM block.

HOL.notes: Dutch Suriname approximation outside the East Indies.

HUN.notes: Southern Slovak strip from targeted SK ADM2 split features.

INS.notes: Dutch East Indies represented separately from the Netherlands proper.

ITA.notes: San Marino is folded into Italy for this scenario baseline.

JAP.notes: Jidong Anti-Communist Autonomous Government area is represented as Japanese-controlled territory for 1936 scenario coloring.

LBA.notes: Italian Libya represented as a distinct colonial administration.

LEB.notes: French Mandate for Lebanon represented as a separate mandate government.

LIT.notes: Project-specific override: Vilnius remains with Lithuania in this scenario instead of strict vanilla HOI4 ownership.

MAD.notes: Madagascar represented as a separate French colony.

MAN.notes: Manchukuo using northeastern China groupings plus the eastern Inner Mongolian and Jehol/Rehe frontier that belonged to MAN in HOI4 1936.

MEN.notes: Mengjiang limited to the Chahar and Xilingol core plus the South Chahar corridor in northern Hebei.

MOR.notes: French Morocco represented as the remaining protectorate area after Spanish Morocco and Spanish Sahara are split out.

MZB.notes: Portuguese Mozambique represented as a separate colonial administration.

NCP.notes: North China collaboration administration across Beijing, Tianjin, the occupied Hebei core, and Shandong while leaving MAN, MEN, and direct Japanese bridgeheads out.

PAL.notes: Approximate Mandatory Palestine using current Israel runtime geography.

PHI.notes: Philippines retained as a United States-associated commonwealth government.

POL.notes: Eastern Polish territories before 1939 partition, approximated with western Belarus and western Ukraine while leaving the Vilnius project override to Lithuania.

PRC.notes: Communist China limited to the northern Shaanbei base area and excludes Xi'an and central Shaanxi.

QMA.notes: Scenario extension: Qinghai Ma clique split from the coarse XSM block.

RAJ.notes: British Raj baseline override for India, Pakistan, and Bangladesh.

RCG.notes: Belgian Congo and Ruanda-Urundi represented as a single Belgian colonial government.

RGC.notes: Shanghai municipality shifts from direct Japanese controller coloring to the Reformed Government preview layer.

ROM.notes: Greater Romania including Bessarabia and northern Bukovina.

SAF.notes: South West Africa approximation under South African control.

SGN.notes: Spanish Guinea represented as a separate colonial administration.

SHX.notes: Shanxi warlord baseline override including the 1936 Suiyuan and Ordos extension.

SIC.notes: Project extension: 1939 Xikang clique owner layer limited to Liu Wenhui's eastern Kham and western Sichuan base without absorbing Chamdo.

SLO.notes: Slovakia appears as a separate axis-aligned puppet state in 1939.

SMR.notes: Spanish Morocco represented using the current northern Morocco approximation, with Ifni folded into the same protectorate block.

SOV.notes: USSR baseline override across the modern Soviet successor states before western-border historical corrections.

SPR.notes: Approximate Spanish fallback for Andorra only; colonial holdings are handled by dedicated subject rules.

SSH.notes: Spanish Sahara represented using the current Western Sahara approximation blocks.

SUD.notes: Anglo-Egyptian Sudan represented as a condominium under British primacy with Egyptian linkage retained in metadata.

SYR.notes: French Mandate for Syria represented as a separate mandate government.

TAI.notes: Japanese colonial rule in Taiwan represented as a distinct subject government.

TAN.notes: Approximate Tannu Tuva using the current Tuva Republic group.

TUN.notes: French Tunisia represented as a protectorate distinct from metropolitan France.

TUR.notes: Hatay transfer to Turkey shortly before scenario start.

VIN.notes: French Indochina represented as a unified colonial administration.

XSM.notes: Ningxia remains under Xibei San Ma and absorbs the far-western Alashan frontier that does not belong to Mengjiang.

YUG.notes: Yugoslavia baseline override across current Balkan successor states.
